_comment: Scalp engine config. Engine daemon reads this every second. Claude updates via the tick's Step 8d audit. Shadow mode = no live orders, just logs paper entries.

EURUSD.reason: engine_desync_loop: 4 consecutive SL hits (b55d/b59c/e0bb/e136) all ~1.8-1.9p SL. Engine unable to track own positions (open_failed misfire). Disabled 2026-04-28T10:55Z. Re-enable after confirming engine tracks positions correctly and SL sizing reviewed (min 5p EURUSD).

GBPUSD.reason: bias reset neutral: comp=+25.5 weak (was bull@+53). Below moderate threshold. Reset 2026-04-28T06:00Z.

AUDUSD.reason: wr=11pct on 19 trades (approaching 20-trade disable threshold); scalp disabled until fresh session reset or strategy review

USDJPY.reason: JPY quote — shadow P/L needs per-pair pip-value conversion, enable after proper sizing lands

USDCHF.reason: CHF quote — same pip-value issue as USDJPY
